results.title: Ahead of PM Modi's visit, France offers tech transfer and Indian weapons integration for 114 Rafales
results.description: Ahead of PM Modi's visit to France for the G7 Summit, the country has signalled its willingness to transfer technology and integrate Indian-made weapons into the proposed 114 Rafale fighter jets.

results.title: Letter to the editor: Two women, multiple deaths, zero remorse
